description.p: A graphical interface for rclone that lets you manage cloud storage accounts without using the command line. Supports dozens of providers including Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, and S3.

ul.li: Built-in file manager: browse, copy, move, rename, delete, and preview files on remote storage
Preview support for images, videos, PDFs, audio, text, Markdown, and code files with syntax highlighting
Mount remote storage as a local drive
Schedule sync, copy, move, and bisync operations using cron expressions
Serve remote storage over HTTP or WebDAV
System tray integration for monitoring active transfers and jobs
Dark and light mode
Encrypted configuration storage and backup/restore support
Multiple remote backends and per-operation profiles

description.p: Troubleshooting: If you encounter an "Invalid binary" error during setup, it is likely caused by an outdated system rclone binary. Go to Settings → Core, clear the rclone binary path, and click Save & Reset Engine. When prompted, let the app download and install the latest rclone version automatically.
For other issues such as a blank screen or freezes on Linux, refer to the Linux Troubleshooting Guide linked below.

screenshot.caption: Add and configure cloud storage providers
Serve storage over HTTP or WebDAV
Mount cloud storage as a local drive
Preview images, PDFs, and text files

ul.li: Nautilus: Added external OS drag-into-app file upload support.
Nautilus: Added "spring-loaded folder" behavior for easier navigation during drag operations.
Nautilus: Now supports multiple independent file browser windows.
Job Detail: Introduced a detailed view modal for granular operation monitoring.
Language: Added Simplified Chinese support.
Tray: Added "Open File Browser" quick access menu item.
Security: Support for environment-based secret management (RCLONE_MANAGER_SECRET).
Core: Support for generic Rclone Environment Variables and upload batch size settings.
Nautilus: Switched to native HTML5 Drag and Drop for a more responsive, system-native feel.
Detailed Remote Card variant added, configurable from the layout editor.
JSON editor for rclone fields is back with optional toggle and improved usability.
Headless mode fixes: file/path selection absolute path resolution and native browser downloads.
AppImage stability improvements for better compatibility across Linux distributions.
Multi-profile mounting fix and various core scheduler improvements.
Runtime Remote profile settings: override remote configuration for the current session without changing the rclone config file.
Windows version of headless builds and Homebrew tap for macOS now available.
Replaced custom date-time picker with native Angular Material component.
Security updates and dependency maintenance.
UI responsiveness following configuration changes.
RPM dependency resolution and CLI tray argument fixes.
CLI flags: --data-dir, --cache-dir, and --logs-dir for custom directory paths.
Platform-native paths for configuration, cache, and logs.
Improved environment variable support for containerized deployments.
File manager: split-view and improved operation tracking.
Spanish language support (thanks to @dikler).
Headless build optimized by feature-gating desktop dependencies.
System tray performance and visual indicators improved.
Jobs are now grouped by remote name and profile (e.g., "sync/Google Drive/default"), making it easier to track per-remote stats.
Disk usage display inside Mount Control when a remote is mounted (rclone rc core/du).
New file manager icons from the Morewaita icon theme.
Additional notifications for app events.
When memory optimization is enabled, the app only reopens from the tray icon.
The app now checks if the configured rclone path is writable; falls back to the default path if not.
Path handling fixed for containerized deployments.
Other small fixes and improvements.
Settings management extracted into a standalone Rust library (rcman) with schema-based configuration, backup/restore, secret storage, and a derive macro for schema generation.
File manager: preview support for dot files, text files, Markdown, and code files with syntax highlighting.
File manager: bulk hash calculation for files in a directory.
Multiple backend support: connect to multiple remote rclone instances from a single app.
Multiple profiles per backend with export and import support.
Multi-language support with community translation.
Log file support for both app and rclone logs.
Modals convert to bottom sheets on mobile, matching GNOME conventions.
Window size is saved on close and restored on next launch.
Support for passing custom rclone flags through settings (reserved flags are blocked).
Replaced legacy settings manager with the new rcman library.
Mount plugin detector improved with dynamic version checks.
Terminal remote support removed; all remote operations handled in-app.
UI simplified.
Tray icon now available in headless mode.
Theme setting now applies correctly.
Access denied error when opening local files in headless mode resolved.

description.p: Note: Old profiles are automatically migrated to the new profile system. Back up your profiles before updating.

ul.li: Multiple profiles for all operations (Sync, Copy, Move, Bisync, Mount, Serve), configurable per remote.
Flatpak autostart desktop entry (fixes #63).
File manager: hash calculation with clipboard copy in the properties dialog.
File manager: public link generation for files and directories (where supported by the remote).
File manager: download button for remote files.
System rclone no longer a required dependency on deb/rpm; the app manages its own rclone binary.
Encrypted export now uses the sevenz-rust crate instead of a standalone 7zip binary. Old exports remain compatible.
Tray icon now shows "Browse (In App)" for unmounted remotes, opening the built-in file manager.
Angular and Angular Material updated to v21.
Provider-specific fields now filter correctly when a provider is selected (fixes #59 and #1).
Reduce animations fixed (fixes #60).
Links in the About modal now open in the default browser.
Memory optimization option (Developer Settings): destroys the window on close instead of hiding it, reducing background RAM usage. On Linux, also cleans up lingering WebKit processes.
Built-in file manager with preview support for images, text files, and PDFs.
Markdown rendering in the About modal for formatted release notes from GitHub.
Local path navigation when configuring remotes that use local file systems.
Flatpak detection with a dismissible warning banner about permission limitations.
VFS Control Panel in mount and serve pages for managing VFS instances and monitoring queues.
Charts removed from sync/copy/move/bisync activity panels; Chart.js dependency removed.
Remote Logs Modal redesigned.
Export Modal redesigned.
Dashboard General Overview panel now supports layout customization.
App update now supports restarting. Windows users are prompted to close the app before updating.
Windows scrollbars now use Fluent Overlay style and no longer push content on appearance.
Schedule support for sync, copy, move, and bisync using cron expressions (e.g., 15,45 8-18/2 * 1,11 1-5).
New time picker for clock-based scheduling.
rclone serve support: start/stop serve commands with status shown in the sidebar.
Backup and restore system fully rewritten. Old backup files are not compatible; create a new backup after updating.
Rust backend refactored for better performance and maintainability.
Critical fix for process management.
